name: Rice Noodles with Peanut Sauce and Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the spaghetti according to package instructions.
2. Mix peanut butter, soy sauce, and grated ginger root in a saucepan.
3. Add chicken bouillon to the mixture.
4. Add spaghetti, bean sprouts, red pepper, and green onion. Toss until well combined.
